content.en:
Time passes slowly.

Ye Tian has been in Taiyi City, the ultimate land, for longer and longer, and he has learned more and more things.

In addition, he also exchanged some of the resources on his body for a small amount of ultimate hedrons.

I have to say that the resources of the outside world are placed in the ultimate place and ~ not precious.

Although the energy of the Ultimate Land is thin, the creatures here do not need much energy to improve their cultivation at the level of servant and soldier level, and it seems that it is easy to improve their strength in the Ultimate Land, and the requirements for -energy are not high.

And the resources he brought are not useful to the Hao level, so they are of some use to the servants and soldiers, and the value is naturally not too high, and they can't be exchanged for too many ultimate-hedrons.

......

Taiyi City, a mansion.

Ye Tianzheng swallowed an ultimate spar, and this ultimate spar was suppressing an inexplicable throbbing in his body, causing the energy flow speed in his body to slow down instantly.

When he swallowed a hundred ultimate crystals in one go, the flow of energy in his body completely stopped.

"A hundred ultimate crystals to stop the flow of energy in the body, the consumption is a bit large. And these 100 Ultimate Crystals can't be used forever, they will be exhausted after a long time, and then they will need another 100 Ultimate Crystals. "

Of course, if there is no ultimate crystal, you can let the energy in your body flow and then keep it at a very low level, such a strong person has extremely weak combat power.

Although it is possible to forcibly squeeze the energy in the body to fight, it is estimated that the energy will be exhausted after a while, and there is no strength to fight.

So, the ultimate hedron is important.

After suppressing the energy in his body no longer flowing, he began to swallow various resources to restore the energy in his body, as well as absorb the energy from the outside world.

Soon after, the energy in the body returned to normal.

After another period of time, Ye Tian made friends with some high-level Ultimate Realm Masters, and got some useful news from them.

If the powerful want to comprehend the ultimate rules, it is difficult to rely on their own penance, and they have to find some special places, which leave the most primitive breath of the ultimate place, and from these most primitive breaths, they can feel the existence of wisps of the ultimate rules.

However, the ultimate rules that every strong person comprehends are different, and only by finding the most primitive ultimate breath that fits can he have a greater hope of comprehending the ultimate rules of his own ultimate system.

And these most primitive ultimate breaths cannot exist forever, if there is an Ultimate Realm Lord to contemplate it, it will be consumed very quickly, and it will eventually dissipate.

So, you need to keep looking.

Of course.

There are other opportunities, but no matter what the chance, the competition is fierce.

If you really meet each other, even if you are good friends with each other, you may be desperately killed.

......

In the following years, some of Ye Tian's replica bodies were sent out to find this kind of opportunity.

Time flies.

this day.

Ye Tian came to a barren land, and suddenly sensed an incomparably mysterious aura, surrounding a black mountain.

Swish!

Ye Tian shuttled over and immediately sensed the existence of several other Ultimate Realm Lords.

These people shot instantly, and they were all joint ultimate dimensional killing moves.

Ye Tian immediately urged several ultimate bodies and easily resisted.

Just as he was about to counterattack, those Ultimate Realm Masters stopped.

"Your Excellency can be enlightened here, but I hope you don't reveal it. "

These Ultimate Realm Masters said.

Ye Tian instantly understood that these people were testing his strength, and if his strength was not good, then he would kill him.

After all, the more strong people come to enlightenment, the less time they have to participate in enlightenment.

"Good!"

Ye Tian agreed.

In fact, he was not sure to kill all these Ultimate Realm Lords, and they were all Hao-level powerhouses who had condensed the Ultimate Body.

So, he chose a place and began to comprehend this ultimate aura.

Rumble!!!

Wisps of ultimate aura were taken by him, and then he sensed it, and found that these ultimate breaths should fit well with the Dark Ultimate Body, although it was not a perfect fit, but it was better than the others.

So, he began to try to comprehend the Darkest Ultimate Rule.

In this way, Ye Tian had more and more insights into the Darkest Ultimate Realm.

"Sure enough, it is only when you come to the ultimate place that you can hope to comprehend the ultimate rules. In the Sea of Dimensions, no matter how much I tried to enlighten, nothing worked. But now, just by contemplating this ultimate aura, I have countless spiritual lights, maybe I have been contemplating here for a long time, and I really hope to comprehend the ultimate rule of darkness!"

0 for flowers0

Ye Tian said darkly.

The ultimate place is based on the ultimate era as the unit of time, and an ultimate era time is also a very long time.

And Ye Tian's replica body has been here for enlightenment, and one ultimate epoch time after another has passed.

The ultimate breath here is also becoming more and more rare.

Until the ultimate aura here was completely exhausted, he didn't comprehend the Darkest Ultimate Rule, but he had a lot of understanding, and his use of the Darkest Ultimate Body reached a high level.

Whew!!!

Several other Ultimate Realm Lords left the place, seemingly looking for other ultimate breaths.

And Ye Tian still stayed here, and began to perfect his Eternal Night Abyss Knife.

And just like that, a few more final epochs passed.

Swish!

The Eternal Night Abyss slashed out with a single sword, and the void of the Ultimate Land was sliced open, and the black mountain in front of him was easily torn apart.

"Very good, the power of the Eternal Night Abyss Knife has increased by at least thirty percent!"

Ye Tian muttered.

With a little progress in the Darkest Ultimate, he has such strength, if he really comprehends the Darkest Ultimate, what a terrifying improvement his strength will get!

After that, he also continued to search for other ultimate aura, if he could find such a place again, he was absolutely sure to comprehend a wisp of the darkest ultimate rule.

......

Taiyi City.

A copy of Ye Tian's body was still cultivating here, and suddenly, the entire Taiyi City was blocked by a force, and a huge figure enveloped the entire Taiyi City.

Immediately afterwards, an inexplicable force pulled a giant-level powerhouse to fly out of Taiyi City.

That's when it happened.

The city lord of Taiyi City, the Dark Eagle Extreme Venerable, appeared and said, "Lord White Ghost Extreme Venerable, what are you doing here?"

"Dark Eagle, is there any problem with me catching some high-ranking people from your Taiyi City? If you dare to talk nonsense, I will kill you, believe it or not?"

The White Ghost Extreme Zun said coldly.

The Dark Eagle Extreme Venerable was too frightened to speak, although he had a background, the White Ghost Extreme Venerable couldn't beat the backer behind him, but it was still easy to kill an ancient-level powerhouse like him.

The Dark Eagle Extreme Venerable is among the ancient level powerhouses, and it also belongs to the nine with very good strength.
